scripts.dev: CLICKHOUSE_HOST=http://localhost:8123 CLICKHOUSE_USER=analytics CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD=analytics123 CLICKHOUSE_DB=analytics tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.start: CLICKHOUSE_HOST=http://localhost:8123 CLICKHOUSE_USER=analytics CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD=analytics123 CLICKHOUSE_DB=analytics node dist/index.js
scripts.clickhouse: docker rm -f clickhouse 2>/dev/null; docker run -d --name clickhouse -e CLICKHOUSE_USER=analytics -e CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD=analytics123 -p 8123:8123 -p 9000:9000 clickhouse/clickhouse-server:latest
